channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate passes reconciliation bill funding ICE for three years, without DOJ fund ban
item.description: Senate Republicans approved funding for DHS immigration enforcement after a vote-a-rama. The measure did not...

item.title: Israel-Hezbollah clashes raise doubts about U.S.-Iran peace deal prospects
item.description: It remains unclear how close the U.S. and Iran are to a deal ending the Iran war, as Israel and Iran-backed He...

item.title: Senate approves $70 billion immigration enforcement bill
item.description: The Senate voted Friday to approve a $70 billion immigration enforcement package that includes no restrictions on the anti-weaponization fund, by a v...

item.title: Iran says no tangible progress in talks; Hezbollah rejects Israel-Lebanon truce
item.description: Iran reports no progress in U.S. talks after tit-for-tat strikes, as Hezbollah rejects a new Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.
